{{Quote|Whatever the truth, I shall do my best to protect the Republic's interests - and those of the Selkath, of course|translated=1|Nilko to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Nilko Bwaas''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] who lived during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He was a member of [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan's]] government, and hired [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] to investigate why the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Republic Embassy (Manaan)|Embassy]] was hiring so many [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]. He offered Revan five hundred [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] in recovering any vital information for him. After Revan discovered that the Republic had an illegal underwater station on [[Hrakert Rift]], Nilko promised to hide the information from the Selkath authorities because of his pro-Republic views.

==Appearances==
